ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_code" TEXT /* Code representing the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Educational standard the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., enrollment, PISA scores) */,
  "natural_minimum" INTEGER /* Natural minimum value for the metric */,
  "global_best_all" INTEGER /* Global best value for all genders */,
  "global_best_female" INTEGER /* Global best value for females */,
  "global_best_male" INTEGER /* Global best value for males */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Code of the data source */,
  "retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last retrieved */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_standard FOREIGN KEY ("standard") REFERENCES standards ("standard_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_source_code FOREIGN KEY ("source_code") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_code" TEXT /* Code representing the standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes in the standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard became effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard was retired (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Code representing the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "data_retrieval_method" TEXT /* Method used to retrieve data from the source */,
  "data_retrieval_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data retrieval */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "value_all" REAL /* Value for all genders */,
  "value_female" REAL /* Value for females */,
  "value_male" REAL /* Value for males */,
  "retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date the value was last retrieved */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., actual, estimated) */,
  "value_source" TEXT /* Source of the value (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the value */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code representing the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_sub_region FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_regions" (
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "sub_region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the sub-region */,
  "sub_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the sub-region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the sub-region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
